🚀 Big Launches.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: OpenClaw
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: An automated script using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials is used for dating.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: PACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Plausible and Actionable Counterfactual Explanations
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A new framework for generating counterfactual explanations in machine learning models.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Auto-FL-Research: Agentic Search for Federated Learning Algorithms
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A new method for searching for federated learning algorithms using agentic search.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: CreativityNeuro: Steering Language Model Weights to Improve Divergent Thinking and Reduce Mode Collapse
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A new method for improving divergent thinking in language models.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg expresses disappointment with the pace of AI progress.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: The Wiola Architecture for Efficient Small Language Models
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A new architecture for small language models.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Agent4cs: A Multi-agent System for Code Summarization in Large Hierarchical Codebases
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A new multi-agent system for code summarization.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Multilayer Q-Matrix-Embedded Neural Network for Cognitive Diagnosis (M-QCDNet): Structure-Aware Deep Learning Architecture for Psychometric Interpretability
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A new deep learning architecture for cognitive diagnosis.

hot_take: The AI industry is facing increased scrutiny and regulation, with companies like Meta and OpenAI exploring new ways to share their profits with the public.
